_description: Manual label template for TetradFlow Tetrad axis annotation (P0-1). Fill 'axis' field for each item. Valid values: Enhance, Obsolesce, Retrieve, Reverse.
_kappa_target: Cohen's kappa >= 0.7 required between two raters before CCA training (P0-1).
